notes: If 6.32 were removed, the chapter's diagnostic 'judge another's pain by your own standard' would not be reconstructible from neighbouring verses. 6.29-6.31 are about seeing-Self-in-all-beings (a metaphysical claim, not a calibration one); 6.33+ is about restless-mind. The analogy-with-self anchor is unique to 6.32. PASS.
